subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-09 in Edinburgh
subcodes.first_line: O Divine providence, shed a ray from the Sun of Truth upon this gathering that it may become illumined.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار پرتوی از شمس حقیقت بر این انجمن زن تا روشن گردد
subcodes.subjects: @light and darkness, @Manifestation of God as sun, @prayer for gatherings; meetings; assemblies, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
